title: Tara Chakkithara
text:
My name is Tara Chakkithara and I am a Machine Learning Engineer in training who lives in Toronto. Please feel free to contact me for inquiries at tara.chakkithara@mail.utoronto.ca.



List your projects and provide links to them.



• Created a neural network from scratch to predict heart disease using
heart disease risk factors.



• Created a neural network with PyTorch to generate classical music based on the styles of Bach, Chopin, Brahms, etc. Used MIDI music files as training data.



• Used multiple linear regression to create an algorithm to predict air temperature using nearby soil temperature and water temperature samples. • TOOLS : Scikit-Learn



• Implemented an HR system with a team using git. • Designed a database and CRUD API to enable efficient data querying for all my team members. • TOOLS : Java, SQlite



• Worked in a team environment with git to create a one on one scheduler. • Used React for the front end and Django for the backend.



• Worked in a team environment with git to replicate the paper : “Energy saving may kill: Evidence from the Fukushima nuclear accident” (Guojun He, Takanao Tanaka). • Cleaned and preprocessed data using tidyverse (R). • Created data visualizations using ggplot2 (R).



Services and Experiences Assistant (Aug 2023 - Oct 2023) HOEM on Jarvis • Managed the front desk at a student residence. • Effectively communicated with a wide range of clients, visitors, and colleagues in a professional manner. • Problem solved tough situations in a team and individual environment. • Deescalated emotionally charged situations by actively listening to student or parent concerns. • Managed my time efficiently as my job required a lot of multitasking
